data.name: 羊噗之戀
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲

★該遊戲沒有任何遊戲性，您唯一可以做的就是觀看圖片動畫和解決成就★

遊戲故事：
有一天主人公的父母為他買了一隻綿羊“咩咩”
並且充滿愛意的生活在一起。

遊戲玩法：
遊戲類似古早的Flash Hgame
在一般場景中，你可以點擊"咩咩"的頭部或是其他部位
"咩咩"會有相應的對話反應
在H場景中你可以點擊"咩咩"的身體部位
接著它將開始對應你點擊的部分，進行相應的動作
遊戲中也製作了控制面板，如果你想直接看所有的動畫
也可以直接點擊按鈕選擇。

*H場景：3種，27種差異
*遊戲沒有結束，大約只需要5分鐘就能看到所有H場景

data.short_description: 與可愛羊"MeiMei"生活在一起的小遊戲
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 繁體中文, 波蘭文, 韓文, 俄文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows®7/8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU supporting DirectX9.0 or OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sheep Love
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game

★This game does not have any gameplay, the only thing you can do is to watch pictures, animations and Unlock achievements★

Game story:
One day, the protagonist’s parents bought him a sheep "Meimei"
Let them live together.

Gameplay:
The game is similar to the old Flash Hgame
In normal scenes, you can click on the head or other parts of "Meimei"
"Meimei" will have a corresponding dialogue response
In the H scene, you can click the body part of "MeiMei"
Then it will start at the part you clicked and perform the corresponding action
If you want to watch all animations directly, in the control panel
You can also directly click the button to select.

* H scene: 3 kinds, 27 kinds of differences
*The game is not over yet, it only takes about 5 minutes to see all H scenes

data.short_description: Little game of living with cute sheep "MeiMei"
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Korean, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows®7/8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GPU supporting DirectX9.0 or OpenGL 4.1
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
